name_cn:
665718 Side Stud Mini Beige
🔔New "MCM" Original Stock 🌈New version double studs, rhombus studs, wide shoulder strap, sheepskin lining, YKK zipper, individually numbered brass plaque. 4 sizes: Ultra-mini convertible strap. Ultra-mini: 17x21x9. Mini: 21x27x10. Small: 26x33x13. Medium: 33x41x15
